tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Thunder Cricket speed adjustment: if the bait just feels heavier or loses vibration, fish are eating but not aggressively — be dialed in to notice. Have multiple weights on the deck (3/8, 1/2, 5/8oz). Heavier = fish faster while staying down. Lighter = slower, longer in strike zone. Tungsten version has tighter vibration for tougher, less aggressive conditions.'
